Join us as we shape Europe's thermal intelligence future

If you want meaningful work, global impact, and a chance to help define the next decade of space-based intelligence, we'd love to meet you.  We build and operate satellites that reveal how the world behaves — supporting governments, critical infrastructure and resources management decisions with trusted thermal intelligence.

See open rolesSubmit open application

Why join

Ever wanted to build something that will outlast you?

We're not making another app. We're building infrastructure. The kind that reshapes industries and strengthens nations.

Do work with real consequences

From defence posture to critical infrastructure resilience. Our data influences the safety, security and sustainability of millions.

Grow fast in a high-trust environment

We hire people who want responsibility. Then, we give them the room to learn, build and lead.

Our values

Co-creation

Together, we achieve more. We co-create, support each other, and lead by example. Always keep learning.

Courage

We push limits through innovation and challenge old ways. Courage means taking risks and accepting discomfort.

Passion

Passion fuels action and engagement. We take calculated risks.  High risk, high reward.

Integrity

Mission results drive everything we do. We deliver outcomes that matter.

Impact

Mission results drive everything we do. We deliver outcomes that matter.

Don't see a role that suits you?

If you think you could contribute, we'd like to hear from you.

Submit open application

Our recruitment process

1. Apply

You send us your CV. We review every application — whether it's for a specific role or a spontaneous submission.

2. Talent Introduction Interview

We talk about your background and what you're looking for. You can ask us anything about the role and the company.

3. Team interview

You meet the people you'd actually work with — engineers, analysts, operators or leaders. We discuss the work, and you get a feel for the team.

4. Final Interview

We dive deep into the role and how you'd contribute. You decide if this is the right fit for you.

5. Offer

We make it clear, fast and transparent. You get time to think it through.

FAQ
